about.title: About us
about.p1: has been operating since 2018 with the goal of raising cleaning standards.
about.p2: In 2021 we launched a laundry service ‘NICE’ focused on speed and quality.
about.p3: Today this is our main focus and we deliver premium service.
about.extra: Our goal is to give people back their most valuable resource — time.

productShowcase.title: Washing & ironing
productShowcase.desc: Our commitment to quality, ecology, and the local community makes us the best choice for your laundry and ironing needs.

premium.text: Fast, reliable and tailored to your needs.

equipment.title: Professional equipment

usluga.heading: How our service works
usluga.description: We pick up your laundry, wash, dry and return it directly to your door.
usluga.title: Washing
usluga.pranjeText: Professional industrial machines and correct temperature for every fabric.
usluga.susenjeText: Temperature control and protection of materials.

faq.question: Do you mix laundry with other clients' clothes?
faq.answer: No — every customer has a separate washing cycle. Our capacity is designed for individual orders, and clothes are never mixed or in contact with other clients' laundry.

faq.question: Is there an option for special requests?
faq.answer: Yes — especially for our premium customers. You can choose detergent and fabric softener, delivery time, as well as additional personalized requests to fully adapt the service to your needs.

faq.question: How is washing quality ensured?
faq.answer: We use professional industrial machines and dedicated programs for each type of fabric. Every item is treated carefully to preserve its quality, shape, and long-lasting durability.

faq.question: Do you offer delivery?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer pickup and delivery service. In New Belgrade there is a minimum of 1300 RSD with free delivery, while in Obrenovac delivery is completely free without restrictions.

faq.question: Do you handle delicate items?
faq.answer: Yes, we also work with delicate and sensitive fabrics. We use special programs and extra care to ensure the material stays fully protected without damage.

testimonials.heading: What our clients say
testimonials.label: Our clients
testimonials.description: Hear what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience with Perionica Nice.

cta.review: Precision, cleanliness, and dedication in every wash make Perionica Nice the first choice for those who want quality without compromise.
cta.phare2: Our clients are our greatest inspiration. Their words of praise and satisfaction are a testament to our dedication and quality of service. Read their impressions and find out why Perionica Nice is the first choice for laundry services.
cta.phare3: Precision, cleanliness, and dedication in every wash make Perionica Nice the first choice for those who want quality without compromise.
